subcodes.title: Interview with Pasteur Monnier at his theological seminary in Paris, 1913-02-17
subcodes.first_line: How are you?... I am likewise most happy... One endowed with the gift of hearing gets the mysteries of God from all things
subcodes.first_line_orig: احوال حضرات را بپرس اسقوف عرض کرد الحمد لله سلامتیم و مسرور از تشریف
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @the cross and the trinity, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @oneness; unity of religion
